title: Objects, Prototypes, Properties, and Data Shape · Console Repair Bay
summary: Model service records and shared behavior while defending against accidental mutation and unsafe property input. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a validated service-record domain model and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create, read, update, delete, enumerate, and compute properties while distinguishing own and inherited state.
Use object destructuring, rest, and spread while accounting for shallow copies, accessors, and overwrite order.
Trace property lookup and method sharing through the prototype chain without class-only mental models.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Inspect the failure record
